task.description: Add a section to GOVERNANCE.md about L1 attribution tracking requirements.

l1.content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' section to GOVERNANCE.md",
  "target_files": ["GOVERNANCE.md"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i '/^## L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements$/a\\n\\n### L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements\\n\\n- Implement L1 attribution tracking for all LLM outputs\\n- Log attribution metrics per user session\\n- Audit model performance against L1 standards'",
    "echo 'Added L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements section to GOVERNANCE.md'"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "test -f GOVERNANCE.md && grep -q 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' GOVERNANCE.md",
    "grep -q 'attribution' GOVERNANCE.md"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "GOVERNANCE.md now contains a section titled 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' with concrete requirements for LLM output attribution.",
  "risk_notes": "No security risks. Requires careful review of L1 standards compliance.",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' section to GOVERNANCE.md
patch_commands:
sed -i '/^## L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements$/a

### L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements

- Implement L1 attribution tracking for all LLM outputs
- Log attribution metrics per user session
- Audit model performance against L1 standards'
echo 'Added L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements section to GOVERNANCE.md'
validation_commands: test -f GOVERNANCE.md && grep -q 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' GOVERNANCE.md
parsed.expected_outcome: GOVERNANCE.md now contains a section titled 'L1 Attribution Tracking Requirements' with concrete requirements for LLM output attribution.
parsed.risk_notes: No security risks. Requires careful review of L1 standards compliance.
